popularStory.headline: THE LISTER FAMILY HISTORY FOLLOWS:
popularStory.description:
LISTER FAMILY

August 7, 2016


1.LORD JOHN LISTER (1370- )
LADY ISABEL deBOLTEN (1374- )

LORD JOHN LISTER was born in about 1370, of Barnoldswick, Lancashire, England, to Richard and Katherine Liste …

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Lister於1370年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾巴諾爾斯維其可時，他的父親Richard Lister25歲，母親Katherine Riley25歲。他於1395年與Isabel De Bolton在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1434年10月21日在英國英格蘭藍卡爾薩利享年64歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Lister于1370年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾巴諾爾斯維其可时，他的父亲Richard Lister25岁，母亲Katherine Riley25岁。他于1395年与Isabel De Bolton在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1434年10月21日在英国英格兰藍卡爾薩利享年64岁，埋葬在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Lister
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a dyer of cloth, Middle English li(te)ster, a derivative of Middle English lit(t)en (Old Norse lita) ‘to dye’. This term was used principally in East Anglia and northern and eastern England (areas of Scandinavian settlement), and to this day the surname is found principally in these regions, especially in Yorkshire.

variants.name: Lester
meanings: English: habitational name from Leicester, which is recorded as Ligeraceastre in the 10th century. The placename derives from an Old English folk name Legore ‘the dwellers by the river Legor (a lost river name)’ + Old English ceaster ‘city, Roman fortification’.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Lestre in Normandy.
English and Scottish: variant of   Lister  .

variants.name: Lyster
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Lister  .
Norwegian: habitational name from the farm name Ljøsta in Romsdal, probably derived from Old Norse ljóstr ‘fishing spear, leister’.
Danish: nickname originally from Bornholm, derived from a word for a fishing tackle for catching eel.

variants.name: Lidster
meanings: English: occupational name for a dyer, Middle Englishlitster (see Lister ).

variants.name: Litster
meanings: English: occupational name for a dyer, Middle Englishlitster (see Lister ).

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: When John Lister was born in 1370, in Barnoldswick, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Lister, was 25 and his mother, Katherine Riley, was 25. He married Isabel De Bolton in 1395, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 21 October 1434, in Sawley, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Lister est né en 1370, à Barnoldswick, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Lister, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Katherine Riley, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Isabel De Bolton en 1395, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 21 octobre 1434, à Sawley, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Lister 1370 in Barnoldswick, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Lister 25 und seine Mutter Katherine Riley 25. Er hat 1395 in England, United Kingdom Isabel De Bolton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 21. Oktober 1434 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Sawley, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Lister è nato il nel 1370 nel Barnoldswick, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard Lister, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Katherine Riley, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Isabel De Bolton nel 1395, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 21 ottobre 1434, nel Sawley, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Listerが1370年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアバーノルドスウィックで生まれた時，父Richard Listerは25歳，母Katherine Rileyは25歳であった。1395年にイギリスイギリスでIsabel De Boltonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1434年10月21日にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアサウリーで64歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Lister(이)가 1370년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 바른드스윅에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Lister(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Riley(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1395년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Isabel De Bolton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1434년 10월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 사w리에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Lister nasceu em 1370, em Barnoldswick, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Lister, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Riley, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel De Bolton em 1395, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 21 de outubro de 1434, em Sawley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Lister родился в 1370 г. в местности барнолдсвикк, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard Lister было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Riley, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel De Bolton в 1395 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 21 октября 1434 г. в местности савли, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Lister nació en 1370, en Barnoldswick, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard Lister, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Katherine Riley, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Isabel De Bolton en 1395, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 21 de octubre de 1434, en Sawley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
